info.name: Lotus Exchange Betting API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Lotus Exchange betting platform.

Demo flow order:
1. Register a new user
2. Login to get tokens
3. Create hierarchy (transfer credit)
4. Deposit funds
5. Fetch markets
6. Place a bet
7. Check orderbook
8. Check exposure
9. View wallet
10. Admin dashboard

Public endpoints (no auth): Health, Markets list, Market odds, Casino providers/games, Payment webhooks, Casino settlement webhook.
Protected endpoints: Require Bearer token via {{access_token}}.
Admin endpoints: Require Bearer token with superadmin or admin role.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints: register, login, logout, and token refresh. Login and Register responses automatically set access_token and refresh_token collection variables.

item.name: Register
item.description: Register a new user account. Roles: superadmin, admin, master, agent, client. Provide parent_id for hierarchical user creation.

item.name: Login
item.description: Authenticate with username and password. Returns access_token, refresh_token, and user profile. Tokens are automatically saved to collection variables.

item.name: Refresh Token
item.description: Exchange a refresh_token for a new access_token/refresh_token pair. The new tokens are automatically saved to collection variables.

item.name: Logout
item.description: Invalidate the current access token. Requires a valid Bearer token in the Authorization header.

item.name: Hierarchy
item.description: User hierarchy management. Manage parent-child relationships, transfer credits between users in the hierarchy, and update user statuses.

item.name: Get All Children
item.description: Get all descendants (recursive) of the authenticated user in the hierarchy tree.

item.name: Get Direct Children
item.description: Get only the immediate (direct) children of the authenticated user.

item.name: Transfer Credit
item.description: Transfer credit from your account to a child user in the hierarchy. The from_user_id must match the authenticated user's ID.

item.name: Get User by ID
item.description: Get a specific user's details by ID. The caller must be an ancestor of the target user in the hierarchy.

item.name: Update User Status
item.description: Update a user's account status (active, suspended, blocked). The caller must be an ancestor of the target user.

item.name: Wallet
item.description: Wallet operations: check balance, view ledger history, and make direct deposits.

item.name: Get Balance
item.description: Get the current wallet balance summary for the authenticated user, including available balance and exposure.

item.name: Get Ledger
item.description: Get the wallet transaction ledger for the authenticated user. Supports pagination via limit (max 100) and offset query parameters.

query.description: Number of entries to return (max 100, default 50)

item.name: Deposit
item.description: Make a direct deposit into the authenticated user's wallet. Amount must be positive. Provide a unique reference for idempotency.

item.name: Betting
item.description: Core betting engine endpoints: place bets (back/lay), cancel unmatched bets, and view orderbooks.

item.name: Place Bet
item.description: Place a back or lay bet on a market selection. Side must be 'back' or 'lay'. Price must be > 1.0. Stake must be > 0. client_ref is required for idempotency. Funds are held for unmatched portions.

item.name: Cancel Bet
item.description: Cancel an unmatched bet by ID. Requires market_id and side (back/lay) as query parameters. Only the unmatched portion can be cancelled.

query.description: The market ID the bet belongs to

item.name: Get Orderbook
item.description: Get the current orderbook (top 5 back and lay levels) for a specific market. Shows available prices and sizes.

item.name: Markets
item.description: Market management and discovery endpoints. Includes public endpoints for fetching live markets/odds and protected endpoints for market CRUD.

item.name: Health Check
item.description: Public health check endpoint. Returns server status, odds provider name, and API version. No authentication required.

item.name: Fetch Markets (Public - Odds Provider)
item.description: Public endpoint. Fetch markets from the configured odds provider and sync them to the local database. Optionally filter by sport.

query.description: Filter by sport: cricket, football, tennis

item.name: Get Market Odds (Public)
item.description: Public endpoint. Get the latest odds for a specific market from the odds provider cache.

item.name: List Markets (Internal)
item.description: List markets from the internal database with optional filters for sport, status, and in_play. Requires authentication.

query.description: Filter by sport: cricket, football, tennis
Filter by status: open, suspended, closed, settled

item.name: Get Market Detail
item.description: Get detailed information for a specific market by ID from the internal database. Requires authentication.

item.name: Create Market
item.description: Create a new market. Requires authentication. Provide all market fields including runners, sport, market_type, and start_time.

body.raw:
{
  "id": "mkt_custom_001",
  "event_id": "evt_ipl_2026_final",
  "sport": "cricket",
  "name": "IPL 2026 Final - Match Odds",
  "market_type": "match_odds",
  "status": "open",
  "in_play": false,
  "start_time": "2026-05-30T19:30:00Z",
  "runners": [
    {
      "selection_id": 1,
      "name": "Mumbai Indians",
      "status": "active",
      "back_prices": [{"price": 1.85, "size": 50000}],
      "lay_prices": [{"price": 1.87, "size": 45000}],
      "last_price": 1.85
    },
    {
      "selection_id": 2,
      "name": "Chennai Super Kings",
      "status": "active",
      "back_prices": [{"price": 2.10, "size": 40000}],
      "lay_prices": [{"price": 2.12, "size": 38000}],
      "last_price": 2.10
    }
  ]
}

item.name: Risk
item.description: Risk management and exposure monitoring endpoints. View exposure per market, per user, or for the authenticated user.

item.name: Get Market Exposure
item.description: Get the aggregated exposure (risk) for a specific market across all users. Requires authentication.

item.name: Get User Exposure by ID
item.description: Get the total exposure for a specific user by user ID. Typically used by admins or parent users.

item.name: Get My Exposure
item.description: Get the total exposure for the currently authenticated user. Uses the JWT token to identify the user.

item.name: Casino
item.description: Casino integration endpoints. List providers and games (public), create/manage game sessions (authenticated), and handle settlement webhooks.

item.name: List Providers (Public)
item.description: Public endpoint. List all available casino game providers.

item.name: List Games (Public)
item.description: Public endpoint. List all available casino games across all providers.

item.name: Create Session
item.description: Create a new casino game session for the authenticated user. Specify the game type and provider ID.

item.name: Get Session
item.description: Get details of a casino session by ID. Requires a valid session token as a query parameter for provider validation.

item.name: Close Session
item.description: Close an active casino game session by ID.

item.name: Settlement Webhook
item.description: Casino provider settlement webhook. Called by the game provider to settle a round. No user auth required (provider-authenticated).

item.name: Session History
item.description: Get the casino session history for the authenticated user. Returns the last 50 sessions.

item.name: Payments
item.description: Payment gateway endpoints for deposits (UPI, crypto) and withdrawals. Includes webhook handlers for Razorpay and crypto payment confirmations.

item.name: UPI Deposit
item.description: Initiate a UPI deposit. Amount must be between 100 and 1,000,000. Creates a pending transaction and returns payment details.

item.name: Crypto Deposit
item.description: Initiate a cryptocurrency deposit. Supported currencies: USDT, BTC, ETH. Creates a pending transaction awaiting blockchain confirmation.

item.name: Withdraw
item.description: Initiate a withdrawal. Amount must be between 500 and 500,000. Methods: upi, crypto, bank. Funds are held until withdrawal completes.

item.name: Get Transactions
item.description: Get the authenticated user's payment transaction history. Supports pagination via limit (max 100) and offset query parameters.

query.description: Number of transactions to return (max 100, default 50)

item.name: Get Transaction by ID
item.description: Get a specific payment transaction by ID. Only the transaction owner can access it.

item.name: Razorpay Webhook
item.description: Razorpay payment webhook handler. No auth required - verified by X-Razorpay-Signature header using HMAC-SHA256.

header.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature of the request body

item.name: Crypto Webhook
item.description: Cryptocurrency payment webhook handler. No auth required. Requires at least 3 confirmations to complete the deposit.

item.name: Reports
item.description: Reporting and analytics endpoints. P&L reports, market reports, dashboard stats, bet volume trends, and hierarchy P&L.

item.name: Get P&L Report
item.description: Get the profit and loss report for the authenticated user. Supports date range filtering via from/to query parameters (format: YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to last 24 hours.

item.name: Get Market Report
item.description: Get a detailed report for a specific market including total volume, number of bets, and settlement details.

item.name: Get Dashboard Stats
item.description: Get the platform-wide dashboard statistics including active users, total volume, open markets, and recent activity.

item.name: Get Bet Volume Trend
item.description: Get bet volume trend data over a time range. The interval parameter controls the granularity in minutes (1-1440, default 15).

item.name: Get Hierarchy P&L
item.description: Get profit and loss reports for all users in the authenticated user's hierarchy. Useful for agents and masters to see their downline performance.

item.name: Fraud
item.description: Fraud detection and monitoring endpoints. Requires admin role. View alerts, resolve alerts, and check user risk scores.

item.name: Get Fraud Alerts
item.description: Get fraud detection alerts. Supports filtering by resolved status and limiting the number of results. Requires admin role.

query.description: Filter by resolved status: true or false
Maximum number of alerts to return

item.name: Resolve Fraud Alert
item.description: Mark a fraud alert as resolved by its ID. Requires admin role.

item.name: Get User Risk Score
item.description: Get the fraud risk score and risk level for a specific user by ID. Requires admin role.

item.name: Admin
item.description: Admin panel endpoints. Requires superadmin or admin role. Dashboard, user management, market management, bet listing, reports, and fraud monitoring.

item.name: Dashboard
item.description: Get the admin dashboard with platform-wide statistics: active users, total volume, open markets, recent activity.

item.name: List Users
item.description: List all users with optional role and status filters. Supports pagination via limit and offset.

query.description: Filter by role: superadmin, admin, master, agent, client
Filter by status: active, suspended, blocked

item.name: Get User
item.description: Get a specific user's full profile by ID. Admin access.

item.name: Update User Status
item.description: Update a user's account status. Valid statuses: active, suspended, blocked. Logged for audit trail.

item.name: Update Credit Limit
item.description: Update a user's credit limit. Sets the maximum amount the user can trade with.

item.name: Update Commission Rate
item.description: Update a user's commission rate (percentage). Applied to settled profits in the hierarchy.

item.name: List Markets
item.description: List all markets with optional filters for sport, status, and in_play. Admin view of all platform markets.

query.description: Filter by sport: cricket, football, tennis
Filter by status: open, suspended, closed, settled

item.name: Suspend Market
item.description: Suspend a market to halt all betting. Market can be resumed later. Action is logged for audit.

item.name: Resume Market
item.description: Resume a previously suspended market to re-enable betting.

item.name: Settle Market
item.description: Settle a market by declaring the winning selection. All matched bets are settled and wallets are credited/debited. Action is logged for audit.

item.name: Void Market
item.description: Void a market, cancelling all bets and returning stakes to users. Used when a market result is invalid.

item.name: List Bets
item.description: List bets with optional filters for market_id, user_id, and status. Supports limit parameter. Admin view of all platform bets.

query.description: Filter by bet status: pending, matched, partial, unmatched, cancelled, settled, void
Maximum number of bets to return (default 50)

item.name: P&L Report
item.description: Get profit and loss report. If user_id is provided, returns that user's P&L. Otherwise, returns hierarchy P&L for the admin.

query.description: Optional: specific user's P&L (omit for hierarchy P&L)

item.name: Volume Report
item.description: Get bet volume trend data for admin reporting. Supports date range and interval granularity.

item.name: Fraud Alerts
item.description: Get fraud alerts from the admin panel. Supports filtering by resolved status and result limit.

query.description: Filter by resolved status: true or false
Maximum number of alerts to return

item.name: WebSocket
item.description: WebSocket endpoint for real-time odds updates. Connect to /ws, authenticate with a token, then subscribe to market IDs. Supports auth, subscribe, and ping message types.

item.name: WebSocket Connection (Info)
WS Auth Message (Template)
item.description: Template for the WebSocket auth message. Copy this JSON into a WebSocket client after connecting.

item.name: WS Subscribe Message (Template)
item.description: Template for the WebSocket subscribe message. Send after authenticating to start receiving live odds updates.
